# Data Retrieval Quality Lab

Sanitized project fixture describing retrieval-adjacent data quality work.

## Evidence

- [EV-DATA-PIPELINE] Built SQL and Python ETL checks for normalized job records, dedupe decisions, and source freshness signals.
- [EV-DATA-RANKING] Compared lexical search ranking strategies with recall, precision, missing-result, and unrelated-result metrics.
- [EV-DATA-GOV] Produced local JSON and Markdown eval artifacts with dataset version, fixture provenance, limitations, and promotion recommendations.
